# dynamodb-toolkit-fetch

> Fetch adapter for `dynamodb-toolkit` v3. Serves the toolkit's standard REST route pack as a `(request: Request) => Promise<Response>` handler.

Zero runtime dependencies. No framework peer dep — `Request` / `Response` / `URL` are platform primitives. Runs on Cloudflare Workers, Deno Deploy, Bun.serve, Hono, itty-router, and Node 20+.

## Install

```sh
npm install dynamodb-toolkit-fetch dynamodb-toolkit
```

## API

```js
import {createFetchAdapter} from 'dynamodb-toolkit-fetch';

const handler = createFetchAdapter(adapter, options?);
// handler: (request: Request) => Promise<Response>
// With options.onMiss: (request: Request) => Promise<Response | null>
```

### Options

- `policy` — partial overrides for the REST policy (envelope keys, status codes, prefixes, limits).
- `sortableIndices` — map sort-field → GSI name for `?sort=`.
- `keyFromPath(raw, adapter)` — convert URL `:key` to a key object. Default uses `adapter.keyFields[0].name`.
- `exampleFromContext(query, body, request)` — derive `prepareListInput` example from the request.
- `maxBodyBytes` — body cap (default 1 MiB). Enforced via `Content-Length` fast-path + streaming byte counter.
- `mountPath` — path prefix to strip before matching (e.g. `/planets`).
- `onMiss(request)` — hook for unknown/off-mount paths; return `null` to yield to a parent router. Without it, misses become terminal `404 Response`.

## Quick starts

```js
// Cloudflare Workers
export default {fetch: handler};

// Bun
Bun.serve({fetch: handler});

// Deno
Deno.serve(handler);

// Hono composition
const planets = createFetchAdapter(adapter, {mountPath: '/planets', onMiss: () => null});
app.all('/planets/*', async c => (await planets(c.req.raw)) ?? c.notFound());
```

## Links

- Parent toolkit: https://github.com/uhop/dynamodb-toolkit
- Sibling (Koa): https://github.com/uhop/dynamodb-toolkit-koa
- Sibling (Express): https://github.com/uhop/dynamodb-toolkit-express
- Route pack reference: https://github.com/uhop/dynamodb-toolkit/wiki/HTTP-handler
